item.title: I’m back home after spending a month and a half outside of the US. honestly, I’m so blessed to be able to do things like that and even more blessed to have friends to ride with while I’m gone 🥹 • • • #motorcycle #ducati #fypシ゚viral #panigale #superbike

item.title: Welcome to ducati airlines 🛩️ I’m TSBK and I’ll be your captain for todays flight 👨‍✈️ we dont have seat belts or peanuts, sorry 😅 #motorcycle #ducati #2wheels #virał #fypシ゚viral #biker
